content:
Legal Walk-In Drive | Cyber Incident Response | Mohali

EXO Edge is conducting a walk-in drive for professionals with hands-on experience in Cyber Incident Response (CIR). 

Dates & Timings:
 • Walk-In Date's: 1 July to 10 July 2026 
 • Time: 10 AM – 5 PM on all days

Apply: https://lnkd.in/evwdb6Jc

Venue: EXO Edge, Office A010 and A011, Ground Floor, Bestech Business Towers, Sector 66, Mohali 160066
Google Maps: https://lnkd.in/erpMkCbX

Open Role: Consultant – Cyber Incident Response
Contract Duration: 3 months
Experience Required: Minimum of 2 to 3 months of experience in CIR, with working knowledge of PII, PHI, Relativity & HIPAA.
Positions: 200
Immediate joiners only

Interested candidates can walk in on any of the above-mentioned dates during the specified time.

Note: This drive is only open to candidates with prior CIR experience.

#EXOEdge #Outsourcing #TRAQ #ExoEdgeCaree #WereHiring #LegalJobs #WalkInDrive #CyberIncidentResponse #ContractRole #GurgaonJobs #HiringNow #Noida #Delhi

Surbhi Kapoor Srishti Sharma Annu Bharti Shivani Arora Vaani Wadhwa Tejinder Kawatra Neelesh Pratap Singh Monika Sharma Ritu G. Kiran Kumar Kumar Sankalp Aman Mehraa Chandra Singh Trilok Singh Rawat Shalabh Shankhdhar Geetika Sharma Sonali Negi
